ads_enable_help: Allows showing self-promotion ads (House Ads) created by you on this site.
api_key_max_length: The API Key must not exceed the maximum length.
api_url_max_length_exceeded: The API URL must not exceed the maximum length.
api_url_required_valid: The API URL must be a valid URL
apple_instructions: Create an identifier in Apple Developer. Set the Return URLs to: {{baseUrl}}/apple/callback
captcha_credentials_json_help: Paste your Google Service Account JSON credentials for reCAPTCHA

checklist.captcha_help: CAPTCHA prevents bots from submitting spam comments. Recommended for any public-facing site.
checklist.content_sources_help: Defines which DOM elements on the page represent articles or posts, and where the interaction widget is injected next to them.
checklist.cors_help: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing controls which external domains are allowed to communicate with this client's API endpoint.
checklist.email_help: Outgoing SMTP settings that allow the platform to send transactional emails such as notifications and verification codes.
checklist.geolocation_help: Detects the geographic origin of users and comments. Used for analytics and content localisation.
checklist.identity_widget_help: The avatar and username element embedded in the client site's navigation bar, allowing users to log in and view their profile without leaving the page.
checklist.login_help: At least one social or native login provider is configured so users can authenticate on the client site.
checklist.moderation_help: AI-powered moderation or toxicity filtering is active to automatically review comments before they are published.
checklist.nostr_help: Nostr is a decentralised messaging protocol used for resilient real-time signalling between peers when the main server is under load.
checklist.p2p_help: Peer-to-peer content delivery via WebTorrent trackers and WebRTC ICE servers for decentralised distribution.
checklist.resilience_help: When enabled, the platform automatically falls back to P2P delivery if the main server becomes unreachable or overloaded.
checklist.translation_help: Automatic comment translation powered by a third-party API, making content accessible to multilingual audiences.
checklist.vapid_help: VAPID keys are required to send browser push notifications to users who have opted in to updates.

client_id_max_length: The Client ID must not exceed the maximum length.
cors_origins_required: At least one allowed origin is required when CORS is enabled
giphy_api_key_help: Your private Giphy API key. Stored encrypted. Leave empty to use the server default.
giphy_get_key_instructions: Get your free API key at
giphy_search_url_help: Override the default Giphy search endpoint. Leave empty to use the server default.
giphy_trending_url_help: Override the default Giphy trending endpoint. Leave empty to use the server default.
delete_client_html: To confirm the deletion of client {{cid}}, please type the client code below:
description_required_min_length: Description must be at least 3 characters
discovery_data_url_help: URL from where to fetch discovery data. Include {{reference}} where appropriate.
discovery_mode_help: Enable to allow automatic content discovery
entity_id_attribute_help: Enter the attribute that identifies the entity (e.g., 'href', 'data-id')
entity_id_attribute_required: The entity ID attribute is required
entity_selector_help: Enter a valid DOM PATH selector (e.g., 'article', '.post', '#content')
facebook_instructions: Create an app in Facebook Developers. Set valid OAuth redirect URIs to: {{baseUrl}}/facebook/callback

reputation.weight_helper: Define the points added or subtracted for each user action.

google_instructions: Create credentials in Google Cloud Console. Set the redirect URI to: {{baseUrl}}/google/callback
interaction_relative_to_help: Enter a DOM PATH selector to position the interaction (e.g., '.article-actions')
invalid_general_config: The comment configuration is incomplete. Please review all fields.
language_api_key_required: Language detection API key is required
login_base_url_required: The login base URL is required
manage_cids_description: Configure and manage your client applications
moderation_prompt_instructions: Note: Include {{text}} in your prompt where you want the comment inserted. Rejected comments must be replied to with the exact text 'Comment Rejected'.
mode_advanced_desc: Security, compliance & content policy — for technical operators
mode_basic_desc: Essential setup — general settings, login, content sources & identity widget
no_clients_yet_help: Create your first client to start managing your site's comments, push notifications, and integrations.
quelora_instructions: Contact support to enable Quelora SSO on your account
resilience_algorithm_help: Cryptographic algorithm used for peer identity. Managed server-side.
resilience_force_mode_help: When enabled, the selected mode is always active regardless of server health.
resilience_general_help: Resilience mode allows the platform to switch to peer-to-peer delivery when the main server is degraded or unreachable.
resilience_key_regenerate_warning: Generating a new keypair will invalidate all existing peer trust signatures. Only proceed if necessary.
resilience_mode_desc_hybrid: Direct server access reserved for registered users. Anonymous users prioritize P2P, using the server only as a fallback. WebRTC signaling operates via server and SSE channels.
resilience_mode_desc_p2p_only: Server provides fresh data only to registered users; anonymous users rely entirely on peers. Centralized signaling is disabled, enforcing decentralized protocols (NOSTR/Torrent).
resilience_mode_desc_passive: The server rejects new user sessions. Existing WebRTC signaling (Server + SSE) and P2P topology for anonymous users remain active.
resilience_mode_desc_server_only: Strict client-server mode. Resilience and P2P topology are completely disabled. The server exclusively handles traffic and may enforce restriction policies.
resilience_public_key_help: This public key is distributed to peers for signature verification. The private key is stored encrypted server-side and never exposed.
resilience_trigger_connections_help: Activate fallback when concurrent connections exceed this value. Set to 0 to disable.
resilience_trigger_event_loop_help: Activate fallback when the Node.js event loop lag exceeds this threshold in milliseconds.
resilience_trigger_memory_help: Activate fallback when heap memory usage exceeds this percentage.
resilience_triggers_help: Set the server-side thresholds that automatically activate the resilience fallback. A value of 0 disables that trigger.
resilience_weight_activity_help: Weight assigned to recent user activity when scoring peers.
resilience_weight_geo_help: Weight assigned to geographic proximity when scoring peers.
resilience_weight_trust_help: Weight assigned to peer trust score.
resilience_weights_help: Scoring weights determine how peers are ranked when selecting relay nodes. The three values must sum exactly to 1.0.
resilience_weights_sum_error: Trust + Activity + Geo must sum to exactly 1.0
site_url_helper: The URL where the client is hosted.
site_url_max_length_exceeded: The site URL cannot exceed {{max}} characters.
site_url_required_valid: The site URL is required and must be valid.
smtp_host_required: The SMTP host is required and must be at least 3 characters
smtp_pass_required: The SMTP password is required and must be at least 6 characters
smtp_port_invalid: The SMTP port must be a valid number between 1 and 65535
smtp_user_required: The SMTP user is required and must be at least 3 characters
test_comment_required: Please enter a comment to test
test_email_error: Error sending test email. Please check your settings
test_geolocation_desc: Enter an IP address to simulate detection with the current configuration.
title: Client Management

tooltip.download_code: Download integration script as a .js file
tooltip.general_comment_config: Configure comments, likes, and moderation rules
tooltip.network_config: Configure TURN server, Nostr relays, and P2P trackers
tooltip.reputation_config: Configure reputation weights and trust levels
tooltip.resilience_config: Configure resilience mode and P2P fallback
tooltip.show_code: View the integration script for this client

toxicity_threshold_help: The score threshold above which a comment is considered toxic (e.g., a higher value is less sensitive).
turn_instructions_help: A dedicated TURN/STUN server improves WebRTC connectivity for users behind strict firewalls or NAT. Leave blank to use the default public servers.
turn_static_auth_secret_help: Shared secret used to generate short-lived TURN credentials. Keep this value private.
validation_errors: Some configuration values are invalid. Please review the highlighted fields.
vapid_icon_invalid_format: Only PNG, JPEG, or JPG files are allowed
vapid_icon_too_large: Image size must be less than 1 MB
vapid_keys_regenerate_warning: If keys were already generated, regenerating them will break all existing push subscriptions until users resubscribe. Are you sure you want to continue?
vapid_keys_success_message: VAPID keys have been successfully generated and assigned.
vapid_private_key_required: VAPID Private Key is required and must be at least 10 characters
vapid_public_key_required: VAPID Public Key is required and must be at least 10 characters
vapid_subject_invalid: A valid VAPID Subject URL is required
vapid_test_message_incomplete: Please complete all fields to send a test notification
vapid_test_url_invalid: A valid notification URL is required
x_instructions: Create an app in X Developer Portal. Set the callback URL to: {{baseUrl}}/x/callback
